methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Lodge Systems is a pre-seed stage company in Defense & Security founded by Stuart Lodge. The valuation universe consists of 21 peers operating in the Defense & Security sector, including 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms. Top private comparables include Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI.

The peer-median approach is not applicable to this valuation. The Defense & Security sector contains sufficient public and private comparables, but none meet the tight filtering criteria required for reliable peer-median triangulation. Of the 21 same-sector peers identified, zero operate at the same pre-seed stage, only one sits at an adjacent stage, and none cluster in a similar valuation tier. Deploying an all-sector median would introduce material distortion given the heterogeneity of stage, capital intensity, and business model across Defense & Security companies. A minimum of three datapoints is required to establish a defensible peer set; the target's position fails to meet this threshold.

Without a triangulated valuation output, a supportable range cannot be derived from the available data. The analysis indicates that pre-seed stage companies in Defense & Security occupy a sparse region of the comparables landscape. Further data collection—either through deeper sourcing of pre-seed Defense & Security firms or through alternative valuation methods such as venture capital method modeling or discounted cash flow analysis—would be required to establish a credible valuation range for Lodge Systems.
